title: fumana glutinosa subsp. laevis
intro: Fumana glutinosa subsp. laevis is a subspecies of the Fumana glutinosa plant, commonly known as the sticky catchfly or sticky catchfly subspecies. It is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region, known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to soothe and calm the digestive system. The medicinal properties of Fumana glutinosa subsp. laevis include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to relieve digestive issues such as diarrhea, constipation, and stomach ulcers. Herbal preparations of Fumana glutinosa subsp. laevis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to promote digestive health and alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS).
